version_description: With cool neo-soul chords - VERY close to the original.

versions.version_description: This tab is based off of the new song by Tyla that has been trending all over tik tok, and so I set to work to discover the tabs. Please enjoy :).

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX

  Please dont forget to rate the tab. (see below) Thanks a lot !!

XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX

There are already two tabs of this song. Here I use the typical
neo-soul chords of this track. I tried to note them down here in this
version.

tabbed from: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XoiOOiuH8iI


The basic movement is just the change from :  Abm9  to   Bbm7

In the verses after Bbm7  there is sometimes  Db/Eb  Ebm7 as a dominant
back to Abm9



Tempo = 118 BPM
--------------------------------------------------------------------


[Intro]
[tab][ch]Abm9[/ch]                   [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
Make me sweat, make me hotter[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]Ebm7[/ch]
Make me lose my breath, make me water[/tab]
[tab][ch]Abm9[/ch]                   [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
Make me sweat, make me hotter[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch]
Make me lose my breath, make me water[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Abm9[/ch]
Normally, I can keep my cool[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bbm7[/ch]                   [ch]Db/Eb[/ch]
But tonight, I'm wildin'[/tab]
[tab][ch]Abm9[/ch]
I'ma be (Yeah) in a dangerous mood[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
Can you match my timing? (Mm, mm)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Abm7[/ch]
Tellin' me (Yeah) that you really 'bout it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch]
Why try hide it? Ooh[/tab]
[tab][ch]Abm7[/ch]
Talk is cheap, so show me[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
That you understand how I like it[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch]  [ch]Bmaj7[/ch] [ch]Db/Eb[/ch]  [ch]Ebm7[/ch] [ch]Abm9[/ch]
Can   you   blow   my   mind?[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
Set off my whole body[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Db/Eb[/ch]  [ch]Ebm7[/ch]  [ch]Abm9[/ch]
If I give  you    my    time (Ooh)[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
Can you snatch my soul from me?[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Abm9[/ch]
I don't wanna wait, come take it[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
Take me where I ain't been before[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Db/Eb[/ch]  [ch]Ebm7[/ch]  [ch]Abm9[/ch]
Can  you   blow   my    mind?[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
Set off my whole body (Whole body)[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Abm9[/ch]
Make me sweat, make me hotter[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch]
Make me lose my breath, make me water[/tab]
[tab][ch]Abm9[/ch]
Make me sweat, make me hotter[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch]
Make me lose my breath, make me water[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Abm9[/ch]
Hopefully you can last all night[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
Don't get too excited (Ooh)[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Abm9[/ch]
Oh, privacy (Mm), you ain't gotta go nowhere[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
You can stay inside it[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]            [ch]Db/Eb[/ch]  [ch]Ebm7[/ch] [ch]Abm9[/ch]
Can   you   blow   my   mind?[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
Set off my whole body[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Abm9[/ch]
If I give you my time (If I give you my time)[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
Can you snatch my soul from me?[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Abm9[/ch]
I don't wanna wait, come take it[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
Take me where I ain't been before (Before)[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Db/Eb[/ch]  [ch]Ebm7[/ch]  [ch]Abm9[/ch]
Can  you   blow   my    mind?[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
Set off my whole body (Whole body)[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Abm9[/ch]
Make me sweat, make me hotter (Hotter)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch]
Make me lose my breath, make me water[/tab]
[tab][ch]Abm9[/ch]
Make me sweat (Sweat), make me hotter (Hotter)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch]
Make me lose my breath, make me water (Make me sweat)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Abm9[/ch]
Make me sweat, make me hotter (Hotter)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch]
Make me lose my breath, make me water[/tab]
[tab][ch]Abm9[/ch]
Make me sweat (Sweat), make me hotter (Hotter)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch]
Make me lose my breath, make me water[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab][ch]Abm9[/ch]
Make me sweat, make me hotter[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch]                            [ch]Db/Eb[/ch]
Make me lose my breath, make me water[/tab]
[tab][ch]Abm9[/ch]
Make me sweat, make me hotter[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch]
Make me lose my breath, make me water[/tab]
